untranslatable_reason: Signal requires front-month vs second-month ATM IV spread comparison and event-driven scheduling logic. These derivatives (IV term structure, specific event dates, option moneyness tracking) are not available in the allowed indicator set. hvol_20 is used as a volatility proxy, but cannot replicate the precise IV spread quantification or event-aware entry/exit timing described in the original rule.
translation_notes: Approximated as SHORT volatility trade using historical volatility as proxy. Original signal requires: (1) explicit front/second-month IV levels, (2) event calendar integration, (3) days-to-event threshold management, (4) precise event announcement timing. The source example shows selling 1 day before unemployment report (Thursday close) and exiting at event (Friday open), but this requires external event scheduling not available in price/technical indicator framework.
